title: Corporate Wellness
meta_description: Improve the health of your organization. Pure Barre offers effective low impact, full-body workouts that strengthen your mind and body.
body_markdown:
# 
Corporate Wellness 
Pure Barre studios offer Corporate Wellness Partners incentives to help their employees to move better, feel better and live better.
![Group squatting while holding dumbbells](https://4194181.fs1.hubspotusercontent-na1.net/hubfs/4194181/273A5497.jpg)
![pb_icon](https://4194181.fs1.hubspotusercontent-na1.net/hub/4194181/hubfs/pb_icon.png?width=60&height=60&name=pb_icon.png)
##  Improve the health of your organization 
Pure Barre offers four group classes with unique full-body workouts focused on low-impact, high-intensity movements that lift and tone muscles and improve strength, agility, and flexibility for everybody.
![Group stretching at Pure Barre](https://4194181.fs1.hubspotusercontent-na1.net/hubfs/4194181/purebarre.com/jpg/About/PB_About_StudioClasses.jpg)
Pure Barre Corporate Wellness Partners receive exclusive membership benefits to offer your employees. Please click below to submit your company information under the 'Corporate Wellness' subject and our team will be in contact shortly!
[ Contact Us ](https://www.purebarre.com/contact-us)
![Two people squatting while holding dumbbells above their head](https://4194181.fs1.hubspotusercontent-na1.net/hubfs/4194181/2020-06-26%20\(1\).jpg)
![pb_icon](https://4194181.fs1.hubspotusercontent-na1.net/hub/4194181/hubfs/pb_icon.png?width=34&height=34&name=pb_icon.png)
##  Healthy Employees are Happy Employees 
Benefits of having healthy employees include:
  

### Increased Productivity
  

Through increased energy and improved focus with a motivation to achieve goals.
  

### Boosted Morale
  

Due to increased serotonin generated through regular exercise.
  

### Employee Retention
  

Satisfied and loyal employees create a cohesive team focused on successful business practices.
The strength that I have gained has allowed me to do so much more outside of the studio. I have never felt stronger and more confident in my entire life. I just knew it was an exercise that I was going to make a part of my life for forever. Pure Barre has become my home.
  
– Ashley H, Hermosa Beach, CA
![](https://www.purebarre.com/corporate-wellness)
##  Our National Partners 
Pure Barre Corporate Wellness Partners receive exclusive membership benefits.
